CheckTitle: Linode Instance has a Cloud Firewall attached
Description: Linode instances are assessed for Cloud Firewall attachment. Instances without a firewall are exposed to all network traffic without filtering, increasing the risk of unauthorized access.
Risk: Without a Cloud Firewall, the instance is directly exposed to the internet with no network-level filtering. Attackers can probe and exploit any listening service.

Code.CLI: linode-cli firewalls create --label my-firewall && linode-cli firewalls device-create <firewall_id> --id <linode_id> --type linode
Code.Other:
1. Log in to the Linode Cloud Manager
2. Navigate to the Firewalls section
3. Create a new firewall or select an existing one
4. Add the instance as a device to the firewall

Recommendation.Text: Attach a Cloud Firewall to this instance to control inbound and outbound traffic. Configure rules to allow only necessary traffic.
